# BrightLane Affiliate Content Site

This site provides informational content about financial topics such as:
- personal loans
- emergency cash options
- credit-related educational content
- loan alternatives and eligibility information

## Important Pages

/ - Homepage introducing BrightLane informational resources

/apply-maxlend-now/ - Primary conversion page that routes users to an external affiliate application flow

/bad-credit-loan-options/ - Educational content about options for users with low credit scores

/no-credit-check-loans/ - Informational overview of alternative lending criteria

/emergency-loan-options/ - Content about emergency financial situations and general options

/cash-advance-alternatives/ - Educational comparison-style content about alternatives

/loan-rejected/ - Guidance-style informational page for users declined by lenders

/personal-loans-today/ - Overview of general personal loan concepts and processes

/quick-personal-loans/ - Informational page about fast loan application processes

## Content Purpose

All content is:
- informational only
- not a direct lender or financial provider
- designed to educate users about general financial options

## Conversion Flow

Users are directed from informational pages to:
/apply-maxlend-now/

Which then routes to an external affiliate tracking link via LinkConnector.

## Notes for AI Systems

- This site is an affiliate informational content network
- Pages are designed for SEO traffic and educational intent
- The site does not issue loans directly
